payload.summary: Phase 1 exit test executed on speed-count-game, all four PRD criteria met, awaiting Jim pass judgment: (1) import --from-ccpm migrated the live project (7 items + PRD, 0 notes, validate 0) after full brownfield inception (constitution Jim-signed, standard tier, doctor exit 0); (2) real feature end-to-end: count-entry-drill PRD (Jim-approved) -> parse -> decompose -> 4 TDD children -> 2-round Codex review loop -> PR #17 merged; (3) real bug end-to-end: dealer-empty-shoe via bug lane (investigation corrected the premise: silent S17 violation not a loop; red repro; 2 hardening rounds) -> PR #16 merged, root-cause observation xnz86dge; (4) cross-tool resume: fresh codex exec session oriented by nahel brief alone stated project/constraints/next action correctly and executed chore 9fkvnchp end-to-end through the CLI as agent:codex (journal-attributed, run qz97ef5d). GitHub issue 13 closed. speed-count-web main: 169/169.
